ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.

classification_rationale: Validates the ability of an Admin to access the user registration form and select a role.

Select role: Manager.
expected_result: User details are entered successfully and role Manager is selected.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.
title: Unauthorized user attempts to access user registration form
classification_rationale: Tests the system's response to unauthorized access attempts.

steps: Attempt to access the user registration form.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. User is denied access to the registration form.

ac_text: Given I am an Admin, when I access the user registration form, then I should be able to enter user details and select a role.

Click the Create User button.
expected_result: User is created successfully and assigned the Admin role.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Unauthenticated request is denied
classification_rationale: This test verifies that unauthenticated requests are denied by the API.
preconditions: API is deployed and accessible.
No authentication token is provided.
steps: Send a POST request to the user creation endpoint with user details.
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error: Authentication required.

ac_text: Given I submit valid user details, when I click "Create User", then the user should be created and assigned the selected role.
title: Unauthorized token is blocked by API
classification_rationale: This test checks that the API blocks requests with unauthorized tokens.
preconditions: API is deployed and accessible.
An unauthorized token is generated.
steps: Send a POST request to the user creation endpoint with user details and unauthorized token.
expected_result: HTTP 403 is returned. Response body contains error: Unauthorized token.
